DOCS/High_Resolution_Layer/CLMS_ATBD_HRL.summary: Initial release of the High Resolution Layer Small Landscape Features 2021 – Algorithm Theoretical Basis Document (ATBD). This document details the theoretical basis and algorithms used for deriving the HRL SLF product suite, including source data, preprocessing, processing for Woody Vegetation Layer, post-processing for Small Woody Features and Street Tree Layer, and internal verification methods.

DOCS/High_Resolution_Layer/CLMS_PUM_HRLS.summary: Initial release of the High Resolution Layer Small Landscape Features 2021 – Product User Manual (PUM). This manual provides a comprehensive guide to the HRL SLF product, covering its key features like the Woody Vegetation Layer, Small Woody Features, Street Tree Layer, and Change Detection. It details product characteristics, specifications, application areas, and technical support information for users.

DOCS/clcplus-core/CLC+Core_User_Manual_I.summary: Added a new annex document titled 'Admin User only' to the CLC+ Core User Manual. This annex provides detailed guidance on functionalities specific to admin users, including organisation and user management, the process for adding/uploading new EAGLE Ontology versions, and the approval workflow for EAGLE barcoding.

Initial release of the CLC+ Core User Manual, Issue 4.0. This comprehensive guide details user interfaces, functionalities, and workflows for ingesting, processing, and extracting data within the CLC+ Core system. It includes sections on EAGLE concept implementation, data catalogue usage, and auxiliary functions, along with an extensive FAQ and glossary.

DOCS/guidelines/editor-manual_v1.qmd.summary:
• Major restructuring and rewrite of the manual to focus on practical editing aspects for the CLMS Technical Library.
  • Updated document title to 'Editor Guide' and revised its description.
  • Removed extensive sections on Quarto and Markdown basics, software installation, detailed rendering, and troubleshooting.
  • Added new simplified sections on document lifecycle, publishing flow, folder and file structure, naming conventions, versioning, and restoring previous versions.
  • Updated the document date.

• Extended explanation for `git docs-restore` functionality.
  • Added major version upgrade process explanation.
  • Added more precise instructions.
  • Minor edits to wording in various sections.

DOCS/guidelines/setup-guide_v1.qmd.summary: Added a new 'Setup Guide' document detailing the integration process for existing project repositories with the CLMS Technical Library. This includes instructions for adding the documentation repository as a Git subtree and configuring essential Git aliases for the documentation workflow.
